problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
